channel.title: artica — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by artica (artica).

item.title: CVE-2021-46678 · 4 MEDIUM — Vulnerability XSS in service form name field
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exist in Pandora FMS version 756 and below, that allows an attacker to perform javascript code executions via the service name field.

item.title: CVE-2021-46680 · 4 MEDIUM — Vulnerability XSS in module form name field
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exist in Pandora FMS version 756 and below, that allows an attacker to perform javascript code executions via the module form name field.

item.title: CVE-2021-46677 · 4 MEDIUM — Vulnerability XSS in Event filter name field
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exist in Pandora FMS version 756 and below, that allows an attacker to perform javascript code executions via the event filter name field.

item.title: CVE-2021-46676 · 4 MEDIUM — Vulnerability XSS in Transaction Map name field
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exist in Pandora FMS version 756 and below, that allows an attacker to perform javascript code executions via the transactional maps name field.

item.title: CVE-2021-46679 · 4 MEDIUM — Vulnerability XSS in service elements
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exist in Pandora FMS version 756 and below, that allows an attacker to perform javascript code executions via service elements.

item.title: CVE-2021-46681 · 4 MEDIUM — Vulnerability XSS in module mass operation name field
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exist in Pandora FMS version 756 and below, that allows an attacker to perform javascript code executions via module massive operation name field.

item.title: CVE-2022-26310 · 7.3 HIGH — Improper Authorization in User Management to Vertical Privilege Escalation
item.description: Pandora FMS v7.0NG.760 and below allows an improper authorization in User Management where any authenticated user with access to the User Management module could create, modify or delete any user with full admin privilege. The impact could lead to a…

item.title: CVE-2022-26309 · 3.7 LOW — Cross-Site Request en Bulk operation (User operation)
item.description: Pandora FMS v7.0NG.759 allows Cross-Site Request Forgery in Bulk operation (User operation) resulting in elevation of privilege to Administrator group.

item.title: CVE-2022-26308 · 3.7 LOW — Improper Access Control in Configuration (Credential store)
item.description: Pandora FMS v7.0NG.760 and below allows an improper access control in Configuration (Credential store) where a user with the role of Operator (Write) could create, delete, view existing keys which are outside the intended role.

item.title: CVE-2022-0507 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Vulnerability: Authenticated SQL Injection in API
item.description: Found a potential security vulnerability inside the Pandora API. Affected Pandora FMS version range: all versions of NG version, up to OUM 759. This vulnerability could allow an attacker with authenticated IP to inject SQL.
